scope.selection_note: Codex-only entity alias cleanup from the current 338 unsuppressed entity duplicate_global_identity rows reproduced with the deterministic identityKeysForRecord scan. No provider-backed commands, materialize, validate, write, ask, canonicalize, identity-review, schema, or ontology commands were run.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch202-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, canonical JSONL, DB, LOG.md, manifest, wiki, submissions, or retired overrides were edited.

deferred.reason: Deferred community-board and CB-number collisions, including cross-borough Community Board 1/4/5/6/7/8/9/10/11/12/14 rows. These require explicit borough and board scope review before aliasing.
Deferred broad Community Advisory Committee/CAC rows because the same generic committee label appears across different corridor and project contexts.

Deferred broad agency, authority, committee, department, and board collisions such as MTA, NYCT, LIRR, Metro-North, MTA Bridges and Tunnels, MTA Board, Finance Committee, and department-level rows. Several appear to mix parent agencies, committees, work plans, and person-role aliases.

Deferred initial-only or weak-name person rows such as P. Dietlin, H. Mihaltses, J. Lieber, M. Herbst, L. Lacewell, F. Borelli, and R. Free where initials alone are not sufficient for this high-confidence batch.

Deferred organization-name rows where the shared key may collapse distinct legal subsidiaries or branded families, such as Siemens/Siemens Mobility/Siemens Industry and similar vendor-family surfaces.

Deferred polluted or contradictory rows where the shared identity key appears attached to the wrong record, including person-to-agency collisions and records like Catherine Rinaldi versus Richard Davey or John Mueller keys on MTAPD records.

commands: jq read-only inspection of data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
bun -e read-only import of identityKeysForRecord and identityDoNotMergeSuppressed over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, without calling validateRepo
node read-only guard checks for selected pairs against current canonical entities, merge roots, and do-not-merge pairs
node read-only canonical record and raw source block evidence inspection
